MINI MINUTES: Defendants David Driver, Emilia Rallapalli, Krishna Rallapalli and Philppine Rallapalli, Demurrer to Second Amended Complaint and Defendants David Driver, Emilia Rallapalli, Krishna Rallapalli and Philppine Rallapalli Motion to Strike. Carroll, Burdick & McDonough LLP (415) 989-5900, appearing for Defendant and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer sustained without leave to amend as to Plaintiff Hussein regarding the sixth cause of action for trespass. Hussein fails to plead trespass damaging an ownership interest as described in Hassolt vs. Patrick Media Group (2000) 84 Cal.App. 4th 153, 171. No reasonable probability that defect can be cured by amendment. Demurrer overruled as to remaining causes of action. Hussein has standing to sue as he is not bringing an action against the HOA to enforce the CC&Rs, but rather is asserting claims against the individual defendants that arose when he owned the property.
